response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 27 years of software engineering experience well exceeding the 15-year requirement and proven entrepreneurial track record, but lacks the specialized AI product expertise and strategic advisory experience the role requires. Current AI work focuses on infrastructure tooling rather than demonstrated products or platforms built with AI, and no advanced degree in AI/ML is evident.
strengths: 27 years of software engineering experience far exceeding requirements, with breadth across web, mobile, embedded, cloud, and infrastructure domains
Proven entrepreneurial background; founder of GISCollective (active since 2009) demonstrating ability to build and maintain products from conception
Recent involvement in AI infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators) shows current engagement with AI ecosystem
concerns: No advanced degree in AI/ML; missing the preferred Master's or PhD in AI-related field and no evidence of AI specialization
Limited evidence of building recognized AI products or platforms; current AI work appears focused on infrastructure and tooling rather than strategic AI-powered products
Career demonstrates broad execution across domains rather than specialized leadership in AI strategy, platform positioning, or advisory roles at director level
